source.note: FULL/verifiable multi-app port; deterministic container grade

task.en: Two seeded apps are open in Safari: TableFind (restaurant reservations) at http://localhost:3008 and HooliCalendar at http://localhost:3017. (1) In TableFind, book a table at Cotogna (the Downtown Scranton Italian restaurant) for next Wednesday at 6:30 PM, party of 6, and confirm the reservation. (2) In HooliCalendar, add a calendar event titled exactly 'Cotogna Dinner — party of 6' for that Wednesday evening.
